note: Visual asset manifest for Batch 2 surfaces (Surface 12: Image Cards, Surface 13: Media Viewer 3D). Assets are placeholder-pending until images/3D models are uploaded.

assets.title: Global Stroke Epidemiology
assets.subtitle: Insiden stroke global dan distribusi regional
assets.alt: Infographic showing global stroke incidence per 100,000 population with regional comparisons

assets.title: Stroke Age Distribution
assets.subtitle: Distribusi usia pasien stroke iskemik
assets.alt: Bar chart showing stroke incidence by age group with peak incidence in 65-84 age range

assets.title: Ischemic Cascade Pathway
assets.subtitle: Kaskade iskemik: dari oklusi ke kematian sel
assets.alt: Diagram showing the ischemic cascade from vessel occlusion through ATP depletion, ion pump failure, glutamate excitotoxicity, calcium influx to cell death

assets.title: Ischemic Core vs Penumbra
assets.subtitle: Zona core vs penumbra pada stroke akut
assets.alt: 3D brain cross-section showing central ischemic core (irreversibly damaged) surrounded by penumbra (salvageable tissue)

assets.title: Therapeutic Window Timeline
assets.subtitle: Jendela waktu terapi: IV tPA vs Trombektomi
assets.alt: Timeline showing therapeutic window: 0-4.5h for IV tPA, 0-24h for mechanical thrombectomy with DAWN/DEFUSE criteria

assets.title: NIHSS Assessment Guide
assets.subtitle: Panduan penilaian NIHSS 11 komponen
assets.alt: Reference card showing NIHSS 11-item scoring rubric with item descriptions, scoring ranges and total interpretation

assets.title: Cerebral Vascular Territories
assets.subtitle: Peta teritorial vaskular serebral
assets.alt: Brain anatomy diagram showing MCA, ACA, PCA, vertebrobasilar territories with corresponding clinical syndromes

assets.title: Stroke vs Mimic: Diagnostic Flowchart
assets.subtitle: Alur diagnosis: stroke asli vs stroke mimic
assets.alt: Clinical decision flowchart distinguishing true stroke from stroke mimics including hypoglycemia, seizure, complex migraine, Todd paresis

assets.title: CT vs MRI in Acute Stroke
assets.subtitle: Perbandingan modalitas imaging pada stroke akut
assets.alt: Side-by-side comparison of CT and MRI findings in acute ischemic stroke, hemorrhagic stroke, and stroke mimics

assets.title: CT vs MRI Imaging Protocol
assets.subtitle: Protokol CT dan MRI pada stroke akut
assets.alt: Radiological comparison showing CT scan (NCCT, CTA) versus MRI sequences (DWI, FLAIR, T2, SWI) in acute ischemic stroke

assets.title: DWI / ADC Interpretation
assets.subtitle: Interpretasi DWI dan peta ADC pada stroke akut
assets.alt: MRI DWI showing restricted diffusion (bright) with corresponding ADC map showing dark signal confirming acute ischemia

assets.title: CTA: Large Vessel Occlusion Detection
assets.subtitle: CTA untuk deteksi oklusi pembuluh besar (LVO)
assets.alt: CT angiography showing large vessel occlusion (LVO) at M1 segment MCA with absence of contrast filling

assets.title: CT Perfusion Mismatch
assets.subtitle: Mismatch perfusion: CBF, CBV, MTT, Tmax
assets.alt: CT perfusion maps showing core infarct (CBF/CBV abnormal) versus penumbra (Tmax/MTT abnormal) mismatch pattern

assets.title: Emergency Stroke Protocol
assets.subtitle: Protokol stroke di unit gawat darurat
assets.alt: Emergency department stroke protocol flowchart from arrival through activation, imaging, treatment decision to ICU admission

assets.title: Door-to-Needle Timeline
assets.subtitle: Target waktu door-to-needle < 60 menit
assets.alt: Timeline showing door-to-needle milestones: triage 10min, CT 25min, CT interpretation 45min, IV tPA 60min target

assets.title: IV tPA Mechanism of Action
assets.subtitle: Mekanisme kerja alteplase (IV tPA)
assets.alt: Molecular diagram showing alteplase binding to fibrin-bound plasminogen, converting to plasmin and dissolving the clot

assets.title: IV tPA Dosing & Eligibility
assets.subtitle: Kriteria eligibilitas dan protokol dosis tPA
assets.alt: Reference card showing IV tPA 0.9mg/kg (max 90mg) dosing protocol with inclusion/exclusion criteria checklist

assets.title: ASPECTS Scoring System
assets.subtitle: Sistem skoring ASPECTS pada CT non-kontras
assets.alt: ASPECTS scoring template showing 10 MCA territory regions on CT with scoring guide (≥6 favors treatment)

assets.title: Mechanical Thrombectomy Devices
assets.subtitle: Perangkat trombektomi mekanik: stent retriever & aspiration
assets.alt: Comparison of thrombectomy devices: stent retriever (Solitaire, Trevo) versus direct aspiration (ADAPT technique)

assets.title: Thrombectomy Step-by-Step
assets.subtitle: Prosedur trombektomi mekanik langkah demi langkah
assets.alt: Step-by-step fluoroscopy images showing microcatheter navigation, stent retriever deployment, clot retrieval and post-procedure angiogram

assets.title: TICI Reperfusion Score
assets.subtitle: Skala TICI: penilaian reperfusi pasca-trombektomi
assets.alt: TICI grading scale (0-3) with angiographic examples: TICI 0 = no reperfusion, TICI 2b/3 = successful reperfusion

assets.title: Cerebral Edema Post-Stroke
assets.subtitle: Mekanisme edema serebral pasca-stroke
assets.alt: Pathophysiology diagram showing cytotoxic and vasogenic edema development in ischemic core versus penumbra zones

assets.title: Decompressive Craniectomy
assets.subtitle: Kraniektomi dekompresi pada malignant MCA infarction
assets.alt: Surgical illustration and CT showing decompressive craniectomy procedure for malignant MCA infarction with cerebral herniation prevention

assets.title: Stroke Recovery Timeline
assets.subtitle: Timeline pemulihan: fase akut ke rehabilitasi jangka panjang
assets.alt: Recovery timeline from acute phase through subacute (weeks), rehabilitation (months) to chronic phase with neuroplasticity milestones

assets.title: Secondary Stroke Prevention
assets.subtitle: Algoritma pencegahan sekunder stroke
assets.alt: Clinical algorithm for secondary prevention: antiplatelet vs anticoagulation based on stroke mechanism (cardioembolic, atherosclerotic, lacunar)

assets.title: Case 1: MRI DWI Findings
assets.subtitle: Kasus 1: temuan MRI DWI pada LVO M1 kiri
assets.alt: Case study MRI showing left M1 LVO with DWI restricted diffusion in left MCA territory, NIHSS 18, CTA confirmation

assets.title: Case 2: Pre/Post Angiogram
assets.subtitle: Kasus 2: angiogram pre dan post trombektomi
assets.alt: Angiogram comparison: pre-thrombectomy showing basilar artery occlusion vs post-thrombectomy TICI 2b reperfusion
